jokes.text: Oops, forgot to take off my ass.
jokes.setup: Reminder to remove metal belongings before using walk-in microwave
jokes.punchline: Bender's robotic ass is metal, delivered as casual afterthought
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender moment - casual robot biology joke with excellent economy

jokes.text: Sorry I'm late. It took forever to take off all my clothes.
jokes.setup: Character apologizing for being late with suggestive explanation
jokes.punchline: Context reveals she's wearing a bikini to work, subverting expectations
jokes.explanation: Mild misdirection that works but isn't particularly clever

jokes.text: That's not a business bikini.
jokes.punchline: Hermes implies there IS such a thing as a business bikini
jokes.explanation: Absurd bureaucratic logic perfectly suited to Hermes' character

jokes.text: Sun's out, buns out.
jokes.explanation: Predictable wordplay but economical delivery

jokes.text: Hermes! You budgie-smuggling slacker.
jokes.explanation: Delightfully specific and creative insult with great economy

jokes.text: As you may recall... -Nope.
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment with excellent timing and economy

jokes.text: According to my calendar, it is now... 'then.'
jokes.punchline: Overly literal interpretation of 'now and then'
jokes.explanation: Clever wordplay that fits Professor's pedantic character perfectly

jokes.text: Like me, this cube is shrinking with age.
jokes.explanation: Mild self-deprecating humor that works for the character

jokes.text: It's heartbreaking, like a summer sidewalk popsicle.
jokes.setup: Melting ice being described as heartbreaking
jokes.explanation: Nice specific imagery that creates unexpected emotional connection

jokes.text: I could just eat them up. Hey, I was using that.
jokes.setup: Amy expressing cute aggression toward baby bears
jokes.punchline: Bender's literal interpretation - she's actually eating something
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection with perfect character reactions

jokes.text: I know what I'm doing. I'm a bear biologist.
jokes.setup: Expert claiming competence while clearly failing
jokes.punchline: Credentials stated while being attacked by bears
jokes.explanation: Classic expert-failing-at-expertise trope, competently executed

jokes.text: I used to be a whale biologist, but I got demoted to bear.
jokes.punchline: Implies hierarchy where studying whales is superior to bears
jokes.explanation: Absurd bureaucratic logic applied to scientific specialization

jokes.text: They're sitting ducks. Like those sitting ducks!
jokes.punchline: Literal sitting ducks in the scene
jokes.explanation: Predictable literal interpretation of metaphor

jokes.text: I hope you choke on those stupid ducks, you stupid whale!
jokes.explanation: Good character breakdown revealing petty resentment

jokes.text: And remove them from their natural habitat? Yeah, that'll teach 'em.
jokes.setup: Leela's noble plan to adopt bears
jokes.punchline: Bender's sarcastic pointing out the irony
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender cynicism cutting through Leela's do-gooder logic

jokes.text: You think I might like weasels? I sure don't!
jokes.setup: Bear biologist asking about new career path
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Bender's unhelpful nature

jokes.text: Here comes the wocket ship!
jokes.setup: Baby talk to bears about rocket ship
jokes.explanation: Fits Fry's childlike character but not particularly clever

jokes.text: They're bears, Fry. They don't even know what a 'wocket ship' is.
jokes.explanation: Good straight-man response that misses the real issue

jokes.text: My smart glasses overloaded!
jokes.punchline: Technology failing from data being too extreme
jokes.explanation: Good visual representation of how bad the data is

jokes.text: Tong time has passed.
jokes.explanation: Simple pun with good economy but low originality

jokes.text: I already went.
jokes.punchline: Scruffy's casual response implying bathroom interpretation
jokes.explanation: Perfect Scruffy moment - misunderstanding doom with characteristic nonchalance

jokes.text: It's been a thousand years! What are you, some kinda science guy?
jokes.setup: Mom's Oil representative making excuse about time needed
jokes.explanation: Good satire of anti-science attitudes in inappropriate context

jokes.text: for the 1,030th consecutive year, no nation came close to meeting them!
jokes.punchline: Absurdly long streak of complete failure
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing futility of climate conferences

jokes.text: Because they're underwater. God rest their souls.
jokes.punchline: They succeeded because the entire country drowned
jokes.explanation: Excellent dark humor with perfect deadpan delivery

jokes.text: Tragedy, human tragedy. But for the rest of us, the party goes on!
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing callous political priorities

jokes.text: Feesee stinks!
jokes.explanation: Weak pun that feels lazy

jokes.text: That's just a bunch of numbers. Very bad numbers!
jokes.punchline: Anti-intellectual dismissal followed by grudging acknowledgment
jokes.explanation: Good satire of data denialism with funny contradiction

jokes.text: Thank you, Madam, for that lovely introduction and the beautiful beachfront condo.
jokes.explanation: Good corruption joke with brazen honesty

jokes.text: Numbers can say anything, depending on who's paying you.
jokes.setup: Climate scientist about to present data
jokes.explanation: Sharp satire of scientific corruption with great economy

jokes.text: Who's paying you, Professor? Big Earth?!
jokes.punchline: Treating planet Earth as conspiracy entity
jokes.explanation: Brilliant absurdist take on conspiracy theories - Earth as special interest

jokes.text: You're an orangutan from the tropical jungles of Borneo!
jokes.setup: Dr. Banjo saying he enjoys warm weather
jokes.punchline: Pointing out obvious bias based on species origin
jokes.explanation: Good logical point about bias with species-specific humor

jokes.text: You just earned yourself a set of patio furniture.
jokes.explanation: Funny escalation of bribery with mundane reward

jokes.text: God made us mortal that we might leave this problem to future generations.
jokes.explanation: Clever theological twist on climate inaction with great structure

jokes.text: That's our children's problem. You tell 'em, Mother.
jokes.setup: Discussion about future generations inheriting problems
jokes.punchline: Bender's callous agreement with enthusiastic endorsement
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender selfishness with casual family reference

jokes.text: What do you call this, you orangu-dope?
jokes.explanation: Decent species pun but not particularly clever

jokes.text: It's just a big bowl of number salad. Salad is for losers!
jokes.explanation: Funny absurdist escalation from data denial to food preferences

jokes.text: Or a cartoon that tries to make science 'funny'?
jokes.explanation: Excellent meta-humor with the show mocking its own premise

jokes.text: Holy hell! Look how high and red it gets!
jokes.setup: Same data presented as colorful graph
jokes.explanation: Good satire of how presentation affects perception

jokes.text: It's the same data with lipstick on it.
jokes.setup: Everyone amazed by graph of same data
jokes.explanation: Sharp observation about data presentation with perfect metaphor

jokes.text: Mama Banjo didn't raise any fools. Except my idiot brother, Mr. Fiddle
jokes.punchline: Immediate contradiction with family member naming pattern
jokes.explanation: Excellent structure with musical instrument family naming and self-contradiction

jokes.text: Well, in that case, let's get lootin'!
jokes.explanation: Good escalation showing how quickly civilization breaks down

jokes.text: I'm willing to listen to a man wearing polar bears as shoes.
jokes.setup: Fry speaking at conference with bear cubs on feet
jokes.explanation: Good visual humor recognition with deadpan delivery

jokes.text: I'm from Mars. Whatever.
jokes.setup: Fry's speech about Earth being our only home
jokes.explanation: Perfect Amy moment with excellent economy undermining emotional speech

jokes.text: Nobody cares about people. Most of us hate each other. Hallelujah!
jokes.setup: Fry making point about human nature
jokes.explanation: Good dark observation with perfect character reaction

jokes.text: Pigpig and Stupidface. I named them! Bear biologist.
jokes.explanation: Good callback to bear biologist incompetence with terrible naming

jokes.text: ♪ We won't do it for our children ♪ ♪ So, let's do it for the bears ♪
jokes.punchline: Honest admission about not caring about human offspring
jokes.explanation: Clever subversion of typical charity song with brutal honesty

jokes.text: ♪ We all hate our stupid families ♪ ♪ So, let's do it for the bears ♪
jokes.punchline: Even more extreme admission about family hatred
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of the family hatred theme

jokes.text: It was impossible to hear me over the more talented singers.
jokes.punchline: Billy Joel admitting others are better
jokes.explanation: Good self-deprecating humor from celebrity character

jokes.text: It destroyed the city of Pompeii 3,000 years ago, so we know it packs a wallop.
jokes.explanation: Good understatement of historical disaster with casual tone

jokes.text: she exploded in 79 AD, like a microwave calzone, smothering our people in a rich ragu of ash
jokes.explanation: Excellent character-specific humor mixing tragedy with food metaphors

jokes.text: who take-a selfies with-a the corpses
jokes.setup: Preserving disaster victims as tourist attraction
jokes.punchline: Modern social media behavior with ancient tragedy
jokes.explanation: Dark humor about disaster tourism and social media narcissism

jokes.text: We don't have time for a crystal-measurin' contest.
jokes.punchline: Bureaucratic metaphor mixing measurement with innuendo
jokes.explanation: Good Hermes bureaucratic humor with mild innuendo

jokes.text: Oh, we do plan to come back. If you say so.
jokes.setup: Blessing for dangerous mission with soul-resting
jokes.explanation: Good character interaction showing Nixon's pessimism

jokes.text: It appears groovy, yet volatile.
jokes.punchline: Describes lava as 'groovy' (both cool and literally having grooves)
jokes.explanation: Mild pun on 'groovy,' fits Amy's Valley Girl speech pattern.

jokes.text: Is this the end of Bender and whoever else is here?
jokes.setup: Group trapped in volcano with apparent doom approaching
jokes.punchline: Bender only concerned about himself, dismissive of others
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender characterization - narcissistic even in mortal danger. The phrasing is quintessentially him.

jokes.text: Sorry, what? I can't hear you over the screaming.
jokes.setup: Morbo asking about situation in volcano
jokes.explanation: Excellent deadpan delivery of terrifying situation

jokes.text: And she never even got to tell me what she loves.
jokes.punchline: Fry focusing on incomplete romantic information during crisis
jokes.explanation: Perfect Fry priorities - romance over life-threatening situation

jokes.text: These jars really should have lids on them.
jokes.setup: Bear cubs getting into specimen jars
jokes.punchline: Mild complaint about obvious safety issue
jokes.explanation: Understated observation about obvious problem

jokes.text: Before the news broadcast cut out, I was trying to tell you how much I love them.
jokes.setup: Fry explaining what Leela was going to say
jokes.punchline: Reveals confession was about bears, not him
jokes.explanation: Good callback subverting romantic expectations with bear obsession

jokes.text: Newspaper? Uh, like TV, but flatter.
jokes.explanation: Good future-past humor with economical explanation

jokes.text: And risk another Calculon song? No, thank you.
jokes.setup: Suggestion to try fixing new climate problem
jokes.punchline: Bender's priorities focused on avoiding bad music
jokes.explanation: Perfect Bender priorities - entertainment over survival

jokes.text: Ooh! Spicy!
jokes.setup: Catching toxic ash snow on tongue
jokes.explanation: Good understated reaction to toxic substance with perfect economy

jokes.text: Not with that gap on your resumé.
jokes.setup: Fry asking for career back after failed parenting
jokes.explanation: Good mundane concern applied to extraordinary situation

jokes.text: No. I taught them that.
jokes.setup: Real mother bear teaching cubs to hunt
jokes.punchline: Fry still taking credit for natural behavior
jokes.explanation: Good final character moment showing Fry's persistent delusion
